note: Rotating list of daily design themes. The runner picks one per run — by default, day-of-year modulo list length, so the rotation is deterministic. Edit freely; order matters.

topics.theme: reduce morning overload — fewer things on screen between 7am–9am
ambient vs interruptive balance — which flags deserve an overlay vs. a quiet card
prioritization when 3+ derived flags are simultaneously true
school updates as a deadline-first layout — earliest due date drives the hero slot
passive gift planning — birthdays compound into a calm lead-time signal, not a prompt
bedtime wind-down — what the dashboard becomes after bedtimeReminderActive fires
weekend vs weekday dashboards — which cards disappear, which expand
